masked_case_json.world_change: a large-cap enterprise hardware and infrastructure supplier was already in a confirmed server-demand upcycle with a large order backlog. a major defense buyer then awarded it a multi-year blanket purchase agreement for enterprise software and infrastructure standardization shortly before a scheduled earnings release. the event added a durable public-sector demand signal on top of an already accelerating hardware cycle.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: Dell Technologies / Dell Federal Systems. Primary sources: Department of War contract award on 2026-05-27 and Dell fiscal Q1 earnings release on 2026-05-28. Outcome check: defense-contract award plus company earnings confirmed accelerating server demand; market reaction on the subsequent print confirmed the cash-flow mechanism. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
